description: concern that does too many unrelated things — should be split into narrow concerns
input:
module AccountHelpers
  extend ActiveSupport::Concern

  def cancel_subscription
    subscription.cancel!
  end

  def send_welcome_email
    AccountMailer.welcome(self).deliver_later
  end

  def generate_api_key
    update!(api_key: SecureRandom.hex(32))
  end

  def archive_projects
    projects.each(&:archive!)
  end

  def calculate_storage_usage
    attachments.sum(:byte_size)
  end
end
